member.name: T:InertiaNet.Context.PropertyContext
member.summary: Context passed to . Provides access to the prop key, sibling props, and the current HTTP request.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.PropertyContext.Key
member.summary: The prop key this object is being resolved for.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.PropertyContext.Props
member.summary: All sibling props (shared + page) at the current resolution level. Allows referencing adjacent prop values.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.PropertyContext.HttpContext
member.summary: The current HTTP context.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.PropertyContext.Request
member.summary: The current HTTP request.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Context.RenderContext
member.summary: Context passed to . Provides access to the component being rendered and the current HTTP request.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.RenderContext.Component
member.summary: The Inertia component name being rendered (e.g. "Users/Index").

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.RenderContext.HttpContext
member.summary: The current HTTP context.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Context.RenderContext.Request
member.summary: The current HTTP request.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService
member.summary: The main Inertia service. Scoped to each HTTP request. Accumulates shared props, per-request flags, flash data, and builds instances for rendering.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Share(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Share a single prop value for the duration of this request.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Share(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Share multiple props at once.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Share(InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesInertiaProperties)
member.summary: Share all props provided by an object.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.GetSharedProps
member.summary: Returns all currently shared props.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.ShareOnce(System.String,System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}})
member.summary: Share a once-prop: resolved once, then remembered by the client across navigations. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::shareOnce(key, callback).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.ShareOnce(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Share a once-prop from a plain value. The value is always resolved (no lazy evaluation), but the client will cache and reuse it across navigations.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Always(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates an from a plain value.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Always(System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}})
member.summary: Creates an from an async delegate.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Optional(System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}})
member.summary: Creates an — excluded on initial load.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Defer(System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a — loaded asynchronously after initial render.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Merge(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a from a plain value — merged with existing client data.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Merge(System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}})
member.summary: Creates a from an async delegate.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.DeepMerge(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a deep- from a plain value.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.DeepMerge(System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}})
member.summary: Creates a deep- from an async delegate.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Once(System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}})
member.summary: Creates an — resolved once, cached client-side.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Scroll(System.Object,System.String,InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesScrollMetadata)
member.summary: Creates a for infinite scroll pagination.
Creates a for infinite scroll pagination (async).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Render(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Renders the given Inertia component with an anonymous object as props.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Render(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Renders the given Inertia component with an explicit props dictionary.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Location(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an external redirect response. For Inertia requests: 409 + X-Inertia-Location. For normal requests: standard 302 redirect.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.ClearHistory
member.summary: Signals the client to clear browser history state.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.PreserveFragment
member.summary: Signals the client to preserve the URL fragment across a redirect (v3).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.EncryptHistory(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables/disables history encryption for the current response.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Flash(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a flash data entry not persisted in browser history state (v3).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.Flash(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Adds multiple flash data entries.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.GetFlashData
member.summary: Returns all flash data accumulated for the current request.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService.WithoutSsr(System.String[])
member.summary: Excludes specific URL paths from SSR (v3).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for InertiaNet.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.RootView
member.summary: The root Razor view used for the initial (non-Inertia) page load. Defaults to "App" (Views/Shared/App.cshtml).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.Version
member.summary: A delegate that returns the current asset version string. Called on every Inertia request to compare with the client-sent X-Inertia-Version header. Return null to disable version checking.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.EncryptHistory
member.summary: Enable history encryption globally for all responses. Can be overridden per-response via IInertiaService.EncryptHistory(). Defaults to false.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.ExposeSharedPropKeys
member.summary: Include a sharedProps metadata array in Inertia responses, listing the top-level keys registered via Share(). Enables frontend optimisations for instant visits. Defaults to true (mirrors Inertia v3 default).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.WithAllErrors
member.summary: Whether to return all validation errors per field (true), or only the first error per field (false, default — matches Inertia convention).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.Ssr
member.summary: SSR (server-side rendering) configuration.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.Pages
member.summary: Page component validation configuration.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions.HandleExceptionsUsing
member.summary: Custom exception handler delegate for Inertia responses (v3). Called when an unhandled exception occurs during Inertia request processing. Return an to render a custom error page, or return null to rethrow the original exception.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.SsrOptions
member.summary: Server-side rendering configuration.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.SsrOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Whether SSR is enabled. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.SsrOptions.Url
member.summary: URL of the Node.js SSR server. Defaults to "http://127.0.0.1:13714".

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.SsrOptions.ThrowOnError
member.summary: When true, SSR render failures throw an exception instead of silently falling back to client-side rendering. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.SsrOptions.ExcludePaths
member.summary: URL path patterns to exclude from SSR. Supports wildcards, e.g. "/admin/*".

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.PagesOptions
member.summary: Page component file validation configuration.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.PagesOptions.EnsurePagesExist
member.summary: When true, InertiaNet verifies that the requested component file exists on disk before rendering. Useful to catch typos during development. Defaults to false (enable in test environments).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.PagesOptions.Paths
member.summary: Directories to search for page component files.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.PagesOptions.Extensions
member.summary: Allowed file extensions for page components.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage
member.summary: Immutable data transfer object representing the full Inertia page object sent to the frontend (either as JSON in an XHR response, or embedded in the initial HTML page as a <script type="application/json"> element).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.Component
member.summary: The frontend component name, e.g. "Users/Index".

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.Props
member.summary: Resolved props to send to the component.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.Url
member.summary: The current request URL (relative, with query string).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.Version
member.summary: The current asset version string (from manifest hash).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.SharedProps
member.summary: Top-level keys of props registered via Share(). Only included when InertiaOptions.ExposeSharedPropKeys is true. Enables the frontend to carry shared props forward during instant visits.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.MergeProps
member.summary: Paths of props that should be merged (appended) with existing client data.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.PrependProps
member.summary: Paths of props that should be prepended to existing client data.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.DeepMergeProps
member.summary: Paths of props that should be deep-merged with existing client data.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.MatchPropsOn
member.summary: Keys used for deduplication when merging. Map of prop path -> match key expression.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.DeferredProps
member.summary: Groups of deferred prop paths loaded asynchronously after the initial render. Map of group name -> list of prop paths.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.ScrollProps
member.summary: Pagination metadata for scroll (infinite scroll) props. Map of prop path -> scroll metadata object.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.OnceProps
member.summary: Once-prop keys with optional expiry timestamps (ms since epoch). Map of prop key -> expiry object (null means no expiry).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.Flash
member.summary: Flash data not persisted in browser history state.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.ClearHistory
member.summary: When true, signals the client to clear the browser history state. Only included in the response when true (v3 optimization).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.EncryptHistory
member.summary: When true, signals the client to encrypt browser history state. Only included in the response when true (v3 optimization).

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage.PreserveFragment
member.summary: When true, signals the client to preserve the URL fragment across a redirect. Only included in the response when true (v3-only).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaResult
member.summary:
The Inertia response result. Implements both (MVC controllers) and (Minimal API endpoints) so it works in both programming models.
On the initial page load (no X-Inertia header): renders the root Razor view with the page object embedded as a <script type="application/json"> element (or SSR body if enabled).
On subsequent Inertia requests (X-Inertia header present): returns the page object as JSON with the X-Inertia: true response header.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaResult.WithViewData(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds data that is available in the Razor view but NOT sent to the frontend.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaContextKeys
member.summary: HttpContext.Items keys used by InertiaNet.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaJsonOptions
member.summary: Shared JSON serializer options for Inertia page object serialization.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Core.InertiaLocationResult
member.summary: An Inertia external redirect — returns 409 Conflict with X-Inertia-Location header. This signals the Inertia client to perform a full-page navigation to the given URL.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for registering the Inertia middleware.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseInertia(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Registers the default in the pipeline.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseInertia``1(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Registers a custom subclass of in the pipeline.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Extensions.ControllerExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for rendering Inertia responses.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ControllerExtensions.Inertia(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Renders an Inertia component with the given props (anonymous object or dictionary).
member.param: An anonymous object whose public properties become props, or an . Pass null for a component with no props.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ControllerExtensions.Inertia(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Renders an Inertia component with an explicit props dictionary.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Extensions.EndpointRouteBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for registering Inertia endpoints.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.EndpointRouteBuilderExtensions.MapInertia(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder,System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Maps a minimal-API endpoint that returns a static Inertia component. Ideal for SPA-style routes that only forward shared props.
member.param: Optional static props (anonymous object or dictionary). These are evaluated once per request by capturing the anonymous object — for dynamic/async props, use in a handler directly.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.EndpointRouteBuilderExtensions.MapInertia(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Maps a minimal-API endpoint that returns a static Inertia component using an explicit props dictionary.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for the Inertia protocol.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.IsInertia(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns true when the request carries the X-Inertia: true header.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetPartialComponent(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the component name from the X-Inertia-Partial-Component header, or null when absent.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetPartialOnly(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the set of prop keys requested in a partial reload (X-Inertia-Partial-Data), or an empty array when absent.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetPartialExcept(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the set of prop keys to exclude from a partial reload (X-Inertia-Partial-Except), or an empty array when absent.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetInertiaVersion(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the version string sent by the client via X-Inertia-Version, or null when absent.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetErrorBag(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the error bag name from X-Inertia-Error-Bag, or null when absent.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetResetKeys(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the reset keys from X-Inertia-Reset, or an empty array when absent.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.HttpRequestExtensions.GetExceptOnceProps(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Returns the once-prop keys already known to the client from X-Inertia-Except-Once-Props, or an empty array when absent.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods on for registering InertiaNet services.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddInertia(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions})
member.summary: Registers all InertiaNet services with the default .

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddInertia``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions})
member.summary: Registers all InertiaNet services with a custom subclass.
member.typeparam: A subclass of that provides shared props, version logic, etc.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddInertiaWithSsr(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions})
member.summary: Registers InertiaNet with SSR enabled, using .

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddInertiaWithSsr``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{InertiaNet.Core.InertiaOptions})
member.summary: Registers InertiaNet with SSR enabled and a custom middleware subclass.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IDeferrable
member.summary: Marks a prop as deferrable — excluded from the initial page load and fetched asynchronously by the frontend after the first render.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IDeferrable.ShouldDefer
member.summary: Returns true if this prop should be deferred.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IDeferrable.Group
member.summary: The deferred prop group name. Props in the same group are fetched together in a single request. Defaults to "default".

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IIgnoreFirstLoad
member.summary:
Marker interface. Props implementing this interface are excluded from the initial (non-partial) page response. They are only included when explicitly requested via a partial reload.
Implemented by: , .

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IMergeable
member.summary: Marks a prop as mergeable — its resolved value is merged with existing client-side data rather than replacing it.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IMergeable.MatchesOn
member.summary: Keys used to match items when deduplicating during a merge.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IMergeable.AppendsAtRoot
member.summary: When true, the resolved value is appended at the root level.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IMergeable.PrependsAtRoot
member.summary: When true, the resolved value is prepended at the root level.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IMergeable.AppendsAtPaths
member.summary: Nested paths at which to append the value.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IMergeable.PrependsAtPaths
member.summary: Nested paths at which to prepend the value.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IOnceable
member.summary: Marks a prop as resolvable once — sent to the client a single time and remembered on the frontend. Excluded on subsequent Inertia visits.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IOnceable.ShouldResolveOnce
member.summary: Returns true if this prop should only be resolved once.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IOnceable.ShouldBeRefreshed
member.summary: Returns true if this prop should be force-refreshed despite being cached.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IOnceable.GetKey
member.summary: Optional custom cache key. When null, the prop name is used as the key.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IOnceable.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Optional expiry timestamp (milliseconds since Unix epoch). When null, the cached value never expires.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesInertiaProperties
member.summary: Implemented by objects that provide multiple Inertia props at once. Useful for grouping related shared data (e.g. auth state, flash messages) into a single reusable object.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesInertiaProperties.ToInertiaProperties(InertiaNet.Context.RenderContext)
member.summary: Returns key-value pairs to be merged into the Inertia props. The provides the component name and request.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesInertiaProperty
member.summary: Implemented by objects that resolve themselves to a single Inertia prop value. Allows custom types to control their own serialization or lazy-resolve sibling props.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesInertiaProperty.ToInertiaProperty(InertiaNet.Context.PropertyContext)
member.summary: Returns the value for this prop. The provides the prop key, sibling props, and request.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesScrollMetadata
member.summary: Provides pagination metadata for a , enabling the Inertia frontend to manage infinite scroll state.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesScrollMetadata.GetPageName
member.summary: The query parameter name for the page number (e.g. "page").

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesScrollMetadata.GetPreviousPage
member.summary: The previous page identifier (number or cursor), or null.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesScrollMetadata.GetNextPage
member.summary: The next page identifier (number or cursor), or null.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Interfaces.IProvidesScrollMetadata.GetCurrentPage
member.summary: The current page identifier (number or cursor).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Middleware.EncryptHistoryMiddleware
member.summary: Per-route middleware that enables history encryption for the current response.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Middleware.EncryptHistoryAttribute
member.summary: MVC action filter attribute that enables history encryption for the decorated action.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware
member.summary: The core Inertia protocol middleware. Add to the pipeline via app.UseInertia() after session / authentication middleware.

remarks.para: Subclass this and override the virtual methods to customise behaviour (share global props, change root view, handle version conflicts, etc.) exactly as Laravel's HandleInertiaRequests middleware works.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.Share(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService)
member.summary: Override to share props for every Inertia response. Called once per request, before the handler runs.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.ShareOnce(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,InertiaNet.Core.IInertiaService)
member.summary: Override to share once-props: resolved once and remembered by the client across subsequent navigations. Equivalent to Laravel's shareOnce() middleware method. Use inertia.ShareOnce(key, callback) inside.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.GetVersion(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Override to return the current asset version string. Return null (default) to disable version-mismatch detection.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.GetRootView(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Override to change the root Razor view name (default: "App").

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.OnVersionChange(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Called when the Inertia version sent by the client differs from . Per the Inertia v3 protocol, the server must return a 409 Conflict response with the destination URL in the X-Inertia-Location header. This tells the client to perform a full-page reload to pick up the updated assets.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.OnEmptyResponse(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Called when an Inertia request receives an empty (204) response. Default: rewrite to 200 so the Inertia client doesn't navigate away.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Middleware.InertiaMiddleware.OnRedirectWithFragment(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.String)
member.summary: Called when a redirect response carries a fragment in the Location header. Default: emit 409 + X-Inertia-Redirect so the client preserves the fragment.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.AlwaysProp
member.summary: A prop that is always included in every Inertia response, even partial reloads that would normally filter it out. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::always().

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp
member.summary:
A prop that is excluded from the initial page load and fetched asynchronously by the frontend after the first render. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::defer().
Can be combined with merge, deep-merge, once, and append/prepend behaviours.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp.Merge
member.summary: Merge the resolved value with existing client-side data (append at root).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp.DeepMerge
member.summary: Deep-merge the resolved value with existing client-side data.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp.Append(System.String)
member.summary: Append the resolved value at a specific nested path (disables root-level appending).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp.Prepend(System.String)
member.summary: Prepend the resolved value at a specific nested path (disables root-level prepending).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp.MatchOn(System.String)
member.summary: Set a key (or keys) used for deduplication when merging.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.DeferProp.Once(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Mark this deferred prop as resolved-once.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.MergeProp
member.summary: A prop whose resolved value is merged with existing client-side data rather than replacing it. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::merge() and Inertia::deepMerge().

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.MergeProp.DeepMerge
member.summary: Enable deep merging (recursive, not just top-level).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.MergeProp.Prepend
member.summary: Prepend (instead of append) at the root level.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.MergeProp.Append(System.String)
member.summary: Append the resolved value at a specific nested path (disables root-level appending).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.MergeProp.PrependAt(System.String)
member.summary: Prepend the resolved value at a specific nested path (disables root-level prepending).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.MergeProp.MatchOn(System.String)
member.summary: Set a key (or keys) used for deduplication when merging.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.OnceProp
member.summary: A prop that is resolved once, sent to the client, and then remembered on the frontend. Excluded on subsequent Inertia visits until it expires or is explicitly refreshed. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::once().

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OnceProp.Fresh(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Force the once-cache to be refreshed on next request.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OnceProp.As(System.String)
member.summary: Set a custom cache key for this once-prop.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OnceProp.Until(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Set an expiry time for the once-cache.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.OptionalProp
member.summary:
A prop that is excluded from the initial page load and only included when explicitly requested via a partial reload. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::optional().
Can also be configured as a once-prop (resolved once, then cached client-side).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OptionalProp.Once(System.Boolean,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Mark this prop as resolved-once, with an optional custom key and TTL.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OptionalProp.Fresh(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Force the once-cache to be refreshed on next request.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OptionalProp.As(System.String)
member.summary: Set a custom cache key for this once-prop.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.OptionalProp.Until(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Set an expiry time for the once-cache.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollMetadata
member.summary: Provides pagination metadata for a . Mirrors the structure used by Laravel's paginator auto-detection.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollMetadata.ToInertiaFormat
member.summary: Converts this metadata to the dictionary format included in the Inertia page object.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollProp
member.summary: A prop designed for infinite scroll / paginated data. Automatically merges its resolved value with the client's existing list (append or prepend based on scroll direction). Carries pagination metadata for the frontend. Equivalent to Laravel's Inertia::scroll().

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollProp.ConfigureMergeIntent(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Reads the X-Inertia-Infinite-Scroll-Merge-Intent header to determine whether to append (scroll down) or prepend (scroll up). Targets the wrapper path (e.g. "data") exclusively — does not merge at root.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollProp.Wrapper
member.summary: The wrapper key path within the resolved data (e.g. "data" for paginator results).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollProp.Defer(System.String)
member.summary: Defer this scroll prop (load asynchronously after initial render).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollProp.DeepMerge
member.summary: Enable deep merging.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Props.ScrollProp.MatchOn(System.String)
member.summary: Set deduplication key(s).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver
member.summary: Resolves the full set of Inertia props for a request, applying partial reload filtering, initial-load exclusions, prop type unwrapping, and metadata collection. This is a faithful port of Laravel's PropsResolver (src/PropsResolver.php).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.ResolveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves shared and page props, returning the final props dictionary and all collected metadata.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.UnpackDotKeys(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Expands top-level dot-notation keys into nested dictionaries. Only top-level keys are unpacked; dots in nested arrays remain literal.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.ShouldIncludeInPartialResponse(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if this prop should be included in a partial reload response. AlwaysProp bypasses all filtering. Others are checked against only/except lists.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.PathMatches(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Bidirectional prefix matching for partial reload paths. "auth" matches "auth", "auth.user", "auth.user.can". "auth.user" also matches parent "auth" so the resolver can traverse into it.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.ShouldExcludeFromInitialResponse(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if this prop should be excluded from the initial (non-partial) response.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.UnwrapPropTypeAsync(System.Object,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: If the resolved value is itself a prop type (e.g. a delegate returned a DeferProp), resolve it one more time. Matches PHP's "post-resolution prop type unwrap" behaviour.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Resolution.PropsResolver.CollectScrollMetadataAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: After all props are resolved, back-fill actual scroll metadata from resolved ScrollProps. Called as part of the post-resolution pass.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Resolution.ResolvedMetadata
member.summary: All metadata collected by during a single resolution pass.
All metadata collected by during a single resolution pass.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Ssr.HttpSsrGateway
member.summary: Dispatches Inertia page objects to a Node.js SSR server via HTTP POST. Supports Vite hot-mode (routes to Vite dev server) and production mode. Gracefully falls back to CSR on any failure.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrException
member.summary: Thrown when SSR rendering fails and SsrOptions.ThrowOnError is true.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Ssr.ISsrGateway
member.summary: Dispatches a page object to the SSR server and returns the rendered HTML. Returns null on failure (the response then falls back to client-side rendering).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Ssr.ISsrGateway.DispatchAsync(InertiaNet.Core.InertiaPage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders the given Inertia page server-side. Returns null if SSR is disabled, the path is excluded, or rendering fails.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrErrorType
member.summary: Categorises the type of SSR failure, matching the SsrErrorType enum from the Inertia Laravel adapter v3.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrErrorType.BrowserApi
member.summary: The SSR script attempted to use a browser-only API (e.g. window, document).

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrErrorType.ComponentResolution
member.summary: The SSR server could not resolve the requested component.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrErrorType.Render
member.summary: The component rendered but threw an error during rendering.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrErrorType.Connection
member.summary: Could not connect to the SSR server.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrErrorType.Unknown
member.summary: An unknown or unclassified error occurred.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrResponse
member.summary: The SSR response returned by the Node.js SSR server. Contains the rendered HTML head content and body content.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Ssr.SsrResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The SSR response returned by the Node.js SSR server. Contains the rendered HTML head content and body content.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames
member.summary: HTTP header name constants for the Inertia.js v3 protocol.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.Inertia
member.summary: Marks the request/response as an Inertia request. Value: "true".

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.ErrorBag
member.summary: Scopes validation errors to a named error bag.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.Location
member.summary: URL for an external redirect (returns 409 Conflict).

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.Redirect
member.summary: URL for a fragment-bearing redirect (v3, returns 409 Conflict).

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.Version
member.summary: Current asset version sent by the server.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.PartialComponent
member.summary: Component name for partial reloads.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.PartialOnly
member.summary: Comma-separated prop keys to include in a partial reload.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.PartialExcept
member.summary: Comma-separated prop keys to exclude in a partial reload.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.Reset
member.summary: Comma-separated prop keys whose merge state should be reset.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.InfiniteScrollMergeIntent
member.summary: "prepend" or "append" — direction for infinite scroll merge.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.ExceptOnceProps
member.summary: Comma-separated once-prop keys already loaded by the client.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.HeaderNames.Purpose
member.summary: Set to "prefetch" by the client when making a prefetch request. Adapters should avoid side effects (session writes, etc.) when this header is present.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Support.ManifestVersionStrategy
member.summary: Computes an asset version string from a manifest file using xxHash128, matching the algorithm used by the Inertia Laravel adapter.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Support.ManifestVersionStrategy.Hash(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an xxHash128 hex digest of the file at , or null if the file does not exist.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Support.ManifestVersionStrategy.HashString(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an xxHash128 hex digest of a string value. Useful for hashing a URL or any other string-based version seed.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Support.ManifestVersionStrategy.FromViteOrMix(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a version strategy delegate that hashes the Vite manifest at wwwroot/build/manifest.json, falling back to the Mix manifest at wwwroot/mix-manifest.json. Returns null if neither exists.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Support.SessionKeys
member.summary: TempData / session key constants used by InertiaNet.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.SessionKeys.ClearHistory
member.summary: Signals the client to clear browser history state.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.SessionKeys.FlashData
member.summary: Inertia flash data (separate from ASP.NET Core's default TempData).

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.SessionKeys.PreserveFragment
member.summary: Signals the client to preserve the URL fragment across a redirect.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.SessionKeys.ValidationErrors
member.summary: Validation errors forwarded across a redirect via TempData.

member.name: F:InertiaNet.Support.SessionKeys.ErrorBag
member.summary: Named validation error bag (from X-Inertia-Error-Bag header).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.TagHelpers.InertiaTagHelper
member.summary: Renders the Inertia app container.

remarks.para: On the initial page load renders:

member.name: P:InertiaNet.TagHelpers.InertiaTagHelper.Id
member.summary: The HTML id of the root div. Defaults to "app".

member.name: T:InertiaNet.TagHelpers.InertiaHeadTagHelper
member.summary: Renders Inertia SSR head tags (meta, title, link elements produced by the SSR server). Outputs nothing on initial client-side renders (when SSR is disabled or returns no head).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.TagHelpers.InertiaTagJsonOptions
member.summary: Serializer options used by the Inertia tag helpers.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage
member.summary: Fluent assertion wrapper for responses. Enables readable assertions in integration tests.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.FromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a new assertion wrapper from an Inertia JSON response.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasComponent(System.String)
member.summary: Asserts the component name matches the expected value.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasProp(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Asserts a prop exists (with optional value check).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.DoesNotHaveProp(System.String)
member.summary: Asserts a prop does NOT exist.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasSharedProp(System.String)
member.summary: Asserts a shared prop exists (from Share()).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Asserts the URL matches the expected value.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasVersion(System.String)
member.summary: Asserts the version string matches.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasNoVersion
member.summary: Asserts no version is set.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasDeferredProps
member.summary: Asserts the page has deferred props.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasDeferredPropGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Asserts the page has the specified deferred prop group.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasClearHistory
member.summary: Asserts the clearHistory flag is set.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasEncryptHistory
member.summary: Asserts the encryptHistory flag is set.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasPreserveFragment
member.summary: Asserts the preserveFragment flag is set.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.HasFlash(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Asserts flash data exists with optional value check.

member.name: P:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaPage.Page
member.summary: Returns the underlying .

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertionException
member.summary: Thrown when an assertion fails.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Testing.InertiaTestExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for testing Inertia responses via .

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.InertiaTestExtensions.AssertInertiaAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Asserts the response is a successful Inertia JSON response and returns an for fluent assertions.
member.exception: Thrown if the response is not an Inertia JSON response.

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.InertiaTestExtensions.AssertInertiaRedirect(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Asserts the response is an Inertia redirect (409 Conflict with X-Inertia-Location).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.InertiaTestExtensions.AssertFragmentRedirect(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Asserts the response is a fragment-bearing redirect (409 with X-Inertia-Redirect).

member.name: M:InertiaNet.Testing.InertiaTestExtensions.AssertVersionRedirect(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Asserts the response is a version-mismatch redirect (303 See Other).

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaRedirect
member.summary: Assertion wrapper for Inertia redirect responses.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaFragmentRedirect
member.summary: Assertion wrapper for fragment-bearing redirects.

member.name: T:InertiaNet.Testing.AssertableInertiaVersionRedirect
member.summary: Assertion wrapper for version-mismatch redirects.
